summary: Admin panel SPA fully implemented with React 18.3 + React Router 6.26 + Tailwind 3.4 + Recharts + Lucide

design_tokens_applied.colors: All 14 CSS custom properties from design_spec.md
design_tokens_applied.fonts: Inter (sans) + JetBrains Mono (mono) via Google Fonts
design_tokens_applied.theme: Dark only, lime accent for CTAs and active indicators

routes./login: Login page with email/password, show/hide password, error handling
routes./: Dashboard with 6 KPIs, provider status card, volume LineChart, success rate BarChart, last transactions table
routes./transactions: Paginated table with filters (app, type, status, search), clickable rows
routes./transactions/:id: Full detail with vertical timeline, data grid, metadata JSON, action buttons (refund, retry callback, simulate payment)
routes./providers: Side-by-side provider cards (INTERNAL vs EXTERNAL), switch modal, history table
routes./webhooks: Tabbed view (Received/Sent), status badges, retry button, expandable JSON payload
routes./apps: App cards grid with masked API keys, new app modal, regenerate key confirmation
routes./settings: Feature flag toggles, simulation delay slider, config table

ui_components.Button: 4 variants (primary/secondary/ghost/danger), 3 sizes, loading spinner, icon support
ui_components.Card: Surface bg, border, 18px radius, CardHeader with title/subtitle/action
ui_components.Input: Dark surface, border, 13px radius, label, error, icon left/right. Select component included.
ui_components.Table: Generic typed table with header, rows, onRowClick, empty state
ui_components.Modal: Dark overlay, escape key, backdrop click, title/body/actions

layout.Sidebar: Fixed 240px, secondary-bg, logo, 6 nav items with Lucide icons, provider indicator
layout.Header: Page title, provider badge, admin name, logout button
layout.InternalBanner: Warning banner shown when provider mode is internal

features.auth: JWT-based with AuthProvider context, auto-redirect on 401, protected routes
features.api_service: Auto-attach Bearer token, 401 handling, typed generic methods
features.formatters: formatCurrency(centavos), formatDate, formatRelativeTime, truncateUuid, maskDocument, formatElapsed, abbreviateCurrency
features.internal_mode_banner: Warning banner on every page when INTERNAL mode active

build.output_size: 607.61 kB JS (173.90 kB gzipped), 20.14 kB CSS (4.97 kB gzipped)
